metric_definitions.pass_pct: Pass% — per-task macro-averaged fraction of methods whose agent-produced test compiled, ran, and passed.
metric_definitions.exec_fail_pct: ExecFail% — per-task macro-averaged fraction of methods where the test compiled but failed at runtime.
metric_definitions.cmpl_fail_pct: CmplFail% — per-task macro-averaged fraction of methods where the agent-produced test failed to compile.
metric_definitions.hrns_fail_pct: HrnsFail% — per-task macro-averaged fraction of methods where the harness could not inject a test (empty output or injection failure).
metric_definitions.discriminating_pct: Success% (test-generation only) — fraction of generated tests that pass on the new revision and fail on the old revision.
metric_definitions.coverage_on_pass: CovOnPass — line coverage on focal dependency methods, averaged only over methods whose tests passed (paired pred/gold denominator).
metric_definitions.mutation_on_pass: MutOnPass — mutation kill ratio on focal dependency methods, averaged only over methods whose tests passed.
